- [ ] Verification

  - Manually verify single IGL display and correct role outline coloring/glows.
"

args.ArtifactMetadata: {"ArtifactType":"walkthrough","RequestFeedback":false,"Summary":"Walkthrough of changes made to fix IGL designation (exactly one per team) and role-specific outlines/glows across the draft roulette, current roster panel, pre-tournament screen, and map veto screens."}
args.CodeContent:
"# Walkthrough - IGL and Role Outline Adjustments

We have successfully implemented:
1. **Single IGL per Team Restriction:**
   - Pre-generated teams, rolled teams, and drafted/user teams now dynamically resolve exactly one IGL (the player with the highest `iglRating`).
   - All other players on the team display their standard role, preventing multiple IGLs.
2. **Role-Specific Outlines and Hover Sync:**
   - Card outlines in the Draft Roulette pool now reflect the player's role color (Red for Duelist, Yellow for Initiator, Purple for Controller, Green for Sentinel, Cyan for Flex, Gray for Coach) instead of the generic orange fit outline.
   - Fit details (e.g. `+ FITS IGL`) are still visible as bottom badges.
   - Hovering over a player card (e.g. a Duelist) lights up the card outline in Red and synchronizes with the Current Roster panel on the right, lighting up the matching role slot in Red as well.

---

## Changes Made

### Component Adjustments

#### 1. [PlayerCard.tsx](file:///c:/Users/Omar/Desktop/Valodraft2/src/components/PlayerCard.tsx)
- Added an optional `isIgl?: boolean` prop.
- Added a fallback IGL resolver checking `TEAM_ENTRY_BY_ID` and finding the player with the highest `iglRating` in their team if `isIgl` is not passed.
- Changed draft mode card borders to use `roleColor.border` by default and `roleColor.glow` on hover.

#### 2. [DraftRoulette.tsx](file:///c:/Users/Omar/Desktop/Valodraft2/src/components/DraftRoulette.tsx)
- Added a `useMemo` block to determine the single IGL player of the current team.
- Passed `isIgl={p.id === iglPlayerId}` to the card renders.

#### 3. [RosterPanel.tsx](file:///c:/Users/Omar/Desktop/Valodraft2/src/components/RosterPanel.tsx)
- Aligned Controller (Purple) and Flex (Cyan) border colors.
- Added a `getSlotHoverStyles` helper mapping each role to its corresponding color outline and glow.
- Used `getSlotHoverStyles` to dynamically set styles when `isHovered` is true.

#### 4. [PreTournamentScreen.tsx](file:///c:/Users/Omar/Desktop/Val
<truncated 817 bytes>
args.Description: "Create walkthrough.md to document IGL and outline coloring changes."
